What we do

Four ways we build leverage
into your business.

From a single automation to a full technology transformation — we scope tightly and ship fast.

01 — AI & AUTOMATION

AI & Automation

Lead capture, document processing, AI agents, reporting — all automated. Your team focuses on growth, not admin.

n8nMakeGPT-4oClaudeWhatsApp API

CTO Advisory

Digital Transformation

Full-scope digital audits and transformation programmes. We map inefficiencies and implement the systems to fix them.

Automation library

Real automations.
Real results.

Six live automation systems we've built and deployed across industries.

AI Lead Response

Every inbound enquiry gets a personalised WhatsApp + email response in under 90 seconds. AI reads intent, writes the message, routes to the best agent.

GPT-4oWhatsApp APIn8nHubSpot
Response time cut from 4h → 90s

Invoice & Document AI

Invoices and contracts are read by AI, data extracted, validated, and synced to your accounting system — no manual entry, no errors.

OCRClaudeMakeXero / QuickBooks
Manual entry eliminated — 100%

KPI Dashboard Auto-Report

Every Monday morning your leadership team receives a fully formatted PDF report with last week's KPIs — generated and sent without a single click.

Google SheetsSlackPDF generationn8n
38 hrs/mo saved on reporting

Client Onboarding Pipeline

When a deal is marked Won in CRM, a full onboarding sequence fires: welcome email, document request, kick-off invite, Slack channel — all within 2 minutes.

HubSpotSlackGoogle CalendarDocuSign
Onboarding time cut by 70%

IoT Alert & Escalation

Sensor thresholds breach → system classifies severity → right team member alerted via SMS/email/Slack with context and recommended action.

MQTTNode.jsTwilio SMSPagerDuty
Alert response from hours → minutes

Marketplace Price Sync

Product pricing and availability stay in sync across your website, Amazon, Noon, and distributor portals — updated automatically whenever your catalogue changes.

WooCommerceAmazon APIMakeWebhooks
Sync errors dropped to zero

Automate my business →How it works
How we work

From first call to live system —
in weeks, not months.

Fixed-price proposals. Clear deliverables. No bloated retainers. No surprises.

01

Automation audit

We map your workflows, identify where time is lost, and quantify the impact. Free for qualified leads.

1–2 DAYS
02

Design & scoping

Architecture decisions, tool selection, and a fixed-price proposal with clear milestones.

3–5 DAYS
03

Build & test

Iterative sprints with weekly demos. You see progress every week, not after months of silence.

2–8 WEEKS
04

Launch & handover

Full documentation, team training, and 30-day post-launch support. You own everything.

1 WEEK
Start a project →

Client results

What our clients say.

“

Tergo built our entire lead automation system in 3 weeks. Response times went from 4 hours to under 2 minutes. Our agents now handle 40% more enquiries with the same headcount.

AA
Ahmed Al-Rashidi
CEO, Bayut Premium
“

The IoT alert system they built for our greenhouses has saved us from three critical failures in six months. Real-time notifications to the right people, every time.

IP
Ion Popescu
Operations Director, Agri Novatex
“

Francesco architected our entire tech stack as fractional CTO. He thinks like a founder, not a consultant. We shipped our MVP 6 weeks ahead of schedule.

PS
Priya Sharma
Founder, PropTech Startup
“

Our Monday morning KPI reports used to take the team 6 hours. Now they arrive automatically at 7am with zero manual work. Absolute game changer.

MB
Marco Bianchi
COO, Hospitality Group
“

The client onboarding automation they built turned a 2-day manual process into a 15-minute automated flow. Our clients love the experience and our team loves the time back.
